pred_reason: SWC-101 (Integer Overflow) is justified due to multiple findings identifying critical arithmetic vulnerabilities requiring SafeMath review. SWC-107 (Reentrancy) applies as multiple high-severity findings confirm reentrancy risks in withdraw/deposit functions violating checks-effects-interactions. Evidence: Finding 4 confirms integer overflow/underflow risks in arithmetic operations; Finding 1 identifies critical reentrancy in withdraw function; Finding 7 notes violations of checks-effects-interactions pattern
